rationale: Postcondition requires structural equality of concrete HashMap<V> fields (post1_self_.receive_state.epmap == post2_self_.receive_state.epmap and similarly send_state.epmap). HashMap<V> is declared #[verifier(external_body)] with only an uninterpreted spec view; the postcondition of send_single_cmessage only constrains the abstract view via SingleDelivery::send_single_message and does NOT constrain the concrete HashMap representation. Therefore concrete epmap equality is not derivable from view equality, and the implication cannot be proven (nor can the hypothesis be shown contradictory). Best-effort proof block establishes (r1 is Some) == (r2 is Some), post1@ == post2@, post1.receive_state@ == post2.receive_state@, post1.send_state@ == post2.send_state@ -- but the epmap structural equality remains unprovable. Same conclusion as previous attempts in the agentic record.
